summary: The frozen current-HEAD runtime contract passes. The previously identified unchanged-HEAD implementation defect is repaired: implement now requires managed-worktree HEAD advancement and returns typed no_progress otherwise, with a pre-fix-sensitive regression fixture. Production-shaped execution still advances implementation and repair HEADs, replays verification and fresh independent review, and permits pr_ready only from current-HEAD final_prepare. Human-only PR creation, merge, waiver, deployment/publication and other material external effects remain outside the autonomous owner; shipped production connector and independent-review ownership are composed rather than duplicated; typed runtime stops, ordered provider fallback, persisted resume, legacy fallback, and attempt/iteration/time/token/cost budgets remain enforced.
inspection_summary: Inspected the current runtime-contract review request, frozen commit sequence and repair diff, Story/Architecture/Spec/test-plan contracts, one-command owner and action result classification, Guarded Run composition, independent review binding, safe-action DAG, provider fallback and budget enforcement, public E2E, focused regression fixtures, exact-HEAD verification ledger and QA artifacts, conformance evidence, import direction, and origin/main change surface. Independently executed 21 production-owner/E2E tests and 57 focused Guarded Run/runtime/safe-orchestrator tests; all passed. The only worktree dirt is the coordinator-managed .vibepro/config.json budget amendment, which was not modified.
inspection_inputs: rg for reverse imports from run-session modules to src/cli.js (no matches)

node --test --test-name-pattern='budget|provider fallback|legacy|review action|resume|repair|final prepare|cancellation' test/guarded-run-session.test.js test/agent-runtime-adapter.test.js test/safe-action-orchestrator.test.js (57/57 pass)
judgment_delta: Previous finding: implement used requireHeadAdvance=false and could silently continue after a completed same-HEAD dispatch -> Final judgment: commit 3e3ad82d changes implement to requireHeadAdvance=true, and the new regression fixture observes blocked/no_progress, unchanged output HEAD, and the explicit managed-worktree non-advance summary.

Initial repair risk: enforcing implementation progress could break the production-shaped success, provider-resume, or independent-review fixtures -> Final judgment: the affected fixtures now mutate/report a distinct authoritative HEAD, the public production-owner flow still commits implementation and repair changes, and the independent 21-test run passes.

Initial repair risk: changed HEAD authority could skip verification/review or accept stale final evidence -> Final judgment: successful repair still replays verify and independent review, review loads the selected Run's managed worktree and current action authority, and final_prepare rejects a missing/stale prepared HEAD or ready_for_pr_create other than true.

Initial authority concern: autonomous runtime composition might expose PR creation, merge, waiver, deployment, publication, or generic material effects -> Final judgment: the canonical DAG ends at final_prepare, the owner rejects every such injected seam before invocation, objectives repeat the prohibition, and current E2E confirms pr_create/merge/waiver are absent.

Initial dependency concern: the closure might duplicate shipped providers/review orchestration or reverse-call the CLI -> Final judgment: guarded-run-session composes the existing runtime coordinator and createGuardedIndependentReviewRunner through injected callbacks, one-command-pr-ready-closure imports no CLI/connector/review module, and reverse-import inspection found no CLI dependency.

Initial operational concern: fallback or resource limits might become advisory during autonomous execution -> Final judgment: provider order is persisted and tried only for typed pre-run availability/auth/quota failures, usage is accumulated, and max attempts, iterations, duration, tokens and cost all produce typed policy stops; focused fallback/budget/legacy/resume tests pass 57/57.

Initial evidence concern: the review request's earlier reuse key is stale after the frozen repair sequence -> Final judgment: the authoritative verification ledger now has unit, integration, E2E, typecheck and build records all strict-head-bound to e7ce2b31 with verified artifacts and no warnings; exact-head conformance improves origin/main from 81 to 80 violations.
